description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6.5-stretch Docker image with a postgres:latest service, defining POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD and POSTGRES_USER variables, and a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores the vendor/ruby directory. Define a single test stage and three jobs—audit, spec, and style—each running on the yale tag and inheriting a before_script that runs apt-get update -q, installs Node.js 10 via curl, prints ruby version, locates ruby, installs bundler with gem, runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor/ruby, and copies config/database.yml.gitlab to config/database.yml. The audit job executes the command "bundle exec rake bundler:audit". The spec job executes the command "bundle exec rspec". The style job executes the command "bundle exec rake check_style 'git diff origin/master --name-status'".
